items.title: Tigers Face Deadline Dilemma As Ace Tarik Skubal Expresses Strong Desire To Stay
items.summary: Tarik Skubal says his preference is to finish the season with the Detroit Tigers and compete for a championship.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: CA boss Greenberg 'open' to England-Australia Test in India
items.summary: "There are opportunities in India to put more content into certain areas," he says
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Man Utd handed Tchouameni boost - Friday's gossip
